description:
The gnome-software package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install gnome-software
rationale: The GNOME software package must be installed so that it can be used for software and firmware updates.
ocil_clause: the gnome-software package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the gnome-software package is installed: 
$ rpm -q gnome-software
fixtext:
The gnome-software package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install gnome-software
title: Install GNOME Software
